page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EDC1682 or TLPL677.

Formerly: EDC1682.

TLPL678 Professional Seminar in Education (1-3 Credits)

Seminar on the issues and problems teacher candidates encounter in classrooms. Exploration of the skills and strategies that best address these challenges.

Prerequisite: Admission to a masters certification program in EDCI. Corequisite: Participation in an arranged school placement.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCI618 or TLPL678.
